content:
Meta’s Learning Phase

:

minimum spend needed to exit it

:


⸻

Meta Learning Phase Rule

Meta Ads needs around 50 conversion events per ad set per week to exit learning.

If your goal is leads, then:
• You need 50 leads/week to stabilize the campaign.
• If your cost per lead is $10–$20, then:

⸻

Minimum Weekly Budget Needed

Let’s calculate both low and high scenarios:

Estimated CPL Leads Needed Minimum Budget
$10 per lead 50 $500/week
$15 per lead 50 $750/week
$20 per lead 50 $1,000/week


⸻

Reality Check:
• If you’re only spending $25/week, that’s 1.25–2.5 leads max, far below the 50 needed.
• Meta keeps restarting learning every time you pause or reset it.
